title: RAG Evaluation (RAGAS/TruLens)
description: Implement RAG evaluation using specialized frameworks like RAGAS or TruLens. Architect metrics for Faithfulness, Answer Relevance, and Context Precision to scientifically measure and improve RAG performance.
objectives: Implement RAG evaluation using specialized frameworks like RAGAS or TruLens.
